title: Yet Another Client Modpack
description: Numerous client modifications while still preserving the authentic vanilla experience.
body:
# Yet Another Client Modpack
The perfect balance between **performance** and **aesthetics**.

YACM is a lightweight modpack designed to enhance your gaming experience with quality of life improvements, subtle animations, tweaks, and embellishments.

## Resource Packs + Credits
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX)
- [Vanilla Evolved](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-evolved) by [Vixel](https://modrinth.com/user/Vixel)
- [BetterHotBar+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/betterhotbar+) by [t2rtle](https://modrinth.com/user/t2rtle)
- [Enchanting Table Magic Circle](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchanting-table-magic-circle) by [Jacosvaldo](https://modrinth.com/user/Jacosvaldo)
- [Better Enchanting Table](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-enchanting-table) by [Jacosvaldo](https://modrinth.com/user/Jacosvaldo)
- [Slightly Improved Font (32x)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/slightly-improved-font) by [Lat](https://modrinth.com/user/Lat)
- [Colourful Containers Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-dark-mode-gui) by [Kingybu](https://modrinth.com/user/Kingybu)
- [Motschen's Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-leaves) by [Motschen](https://modrinth.com/user/Motschen)
- [Blue's Better Cats](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mrblueyetis-better-cats) by [mrblueyeti](https://modrinth.com/user/Mrblueyeti)
- [Better Dogs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-dogs) by [mrblueyeti](https://modrinth.com/user/Mrblueyeti)
- [Extended illumina NEA Support](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/extended-illumina-(not-enough-animations)) by [Ilyastik](https://modrinth.com/user/Ilyastik)
## Mods + Credits
### Sounds
- New ambient sounds ([AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) by [creativemd](https://modrinth.com/user/creativemd))
- New UI and chat sounds ([Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound) by [mineblock11](https://modrinth.com/user/mineblock11))
- New sound physics ([Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) by [henkelmax](https://modrinth.com/user/henkelmax))
- New footsteps sounds ([Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) by [Sollace](https://modrinth.com/user/Sollace))
### Visuals and Animations
- [EatingAnimation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) by [theoness1](https://modrinth.com/user/theoness1)
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) by [dzwdz](https://modrinth.com/user/dzwdz), maintained by [Fourmisain](https://modrinth.com/user/Fourmisain)
- [Chat Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatanimation) by [Ezzenix](https://modrinth.com/user/Ezzenix)
- Falling Leaves ([Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-leaves-fabric), [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves)) by [RandomMcSomethin](https://modrinth.com/user/randommcsomethin)
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw)
- [Paginated Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/paginatedadvancements) by [DaFuqs](https://modrinth.com/user/DaFuqs)
- ~~Legendary Tooltips~~ (1.20.4 only)
- [Smooth Scrolling](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-scroll) by [SmajloSlovakian](https://modrinth.com/user/SmajloSlovakian)
### HUD
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) by [squeek502](https://modrinth.com/user/squeek502)
- [Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud) by [Lortseam](https://modrinth.com/user/Lortseam)
- [Better F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) by [TreyRuffy](https://modrinth.com/user/TreyRuffy) and [cominixo](https://modrinth.com/user/cominixo)
- ~~Giselbaer's Durability Viewer~~ (1.20.4 only)
- ~~Item Highlighter~~ (1.20.4 only)
- [Journey map](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap) by [mysticdrew](https://modrinth.com/user/mysticdrew)
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) by [Snownee](https://modrinth.com/user/Snownee)
- ~~Leave My Bars Alone~~ (1.20.4 only)
- [Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars) by [A5b84](https://modrinth.com/user/A5b84)
### Optimizations
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3), maintained by [IMS](https://modrinth.com/user/IMS)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium/) by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3), maintained by [2No2Name](https://modrinth.com/user/2No2Name)
- [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky) by [pop4959](https://modrinth.com/user/pop4959)
- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) by [isxander](https://modrinth.com/user/isxander)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) by [malte0811](https://modrinth.com/user/malte0811)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) by [juliand665](https://modrinth.com/user/juliand665)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw)
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) by [thosea](https://modrinth.com/user/thosea)
- ~~Starlight~~ (1.20.4 only)
- ~~More Culling~~ (1.20.4 only)
- [Modern Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) by [embeddedt](https://modrinth.com/user/embeddedt)
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) by [FoundationGames](https://modrinth.com/user/FoundationGames)
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) by [Traben](https://modrinth.com/user/Traben)
## Mods options
#### **Don't forget that you can change other Mods options in the "Mods" tab!**
